name: Sage Intacct ERP API
what_it_does: Sage Intacct XML/REST API for cloud financial management and ERP platform. Enables AI agents to manage general ledger entries, accounts payable/receivable, billing, purchasing, inventory, and financial reporting. Integrate financial data into business workflows. Sage Intacct is AICPA preferred and widely used by service organizations and non-profits.
use_cases: Creating and managing journal entries from financial operations automation agents
Processing AP invoices and vendor payments from accounts payable agents
Retrieving financial reports and dimensional analytics from finance reporting agents
Integrating Intacct financial data into ERP and CRM workflow agents
not_for: Simple small business accounting without multi-entity needs
best_when: A mid-market or enterprise organization using Sage Intacct wants AI agents to automate financial operations, process AP invoices, and integrate ERP data into business workflows.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: ERP data manipulation can cause accounting errors, incorrect financial statements, and compliance issues. Always use Intacct sandbox for testing.

auth.notes: Sage Intacct uses XML-based API with session authentication. Sender ID + password + company ID + user credentials generate session tokens. SDK wrapper available. Moving toward REST API but XML still primary.

pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise ERP pricing based on modules and users
pricing.notes: AICPA preferred solution. Enterprise mid-market pricing. Sage company. Sandbox environment provided.

performance.rate_limits: API calls limited per subscription; contact Intacct for specifics

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: ERP financial data — always test in Intacct sandbox before production
No public MCP server — XML-based API integration (not REST) required
Intacct API is XML-based, not JSON — requires XML parsing and construction in agents
Session tokens are short-lived — implement session refresh for long-running agents
Intacct's dimensional reporting model (entities, dimensions) requires understanding the data model
No webhooks — must poll for transaction and approval status changes
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Full ERP financial access. SOC2, SOC1, GDPR. XML API with session tokens. Sandbox environment required for testing.

security_score_components.security_notes: Full ERP financial access. SOC2, SOC1, GDPR. XML API with session auth. EU data residency.
